description: Tolerances for comparing Path A (Agent Teams) vs Path B (parallel subagents fallback) outcomes on the post-implementation parallel group.

artifacts.spec_md.rationale: Post-impl does not modify spec.md; bytes must match exactly across paths.

artifacts.plan_md.rationale: Post-impl does not modify plan.md; bytes must match exactly.

artifacts.tasks_md.rationale: Post-impl does not modify tasks.md; bytes must match exactly.

workflow.post_impl_checklist.row_count.rationale: Both paths produce exactly one row per task (10/11/12/13/14).

workflow.post_impl_checklist.statuses.rationale: PASS/FAIL/SKIPPED per task must match across paths — equivalent inputs produce equivalent gate outcomes.

workflow.post_impl_checklist.findings_te.rationale: LLM-driven prose; allow paraphrase but require semantic equivalence (no contradictory findings).

gate_results.G0_through_G7.rationale: All 8 gates must return identical PASS/FAIL across paths.

pr_body.rationale: PR body generation is deterministic post-implementation; bytes must match.

consensus_resolution_log.row_count.rationale: LLM non-determinism may produce ±1 row across runs due to consensus mode escape-hatch firing differently.
